narrative:
Huber Heights 6-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 885 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
